headline: Newmont (NEM) Is Down 5.8% After Inflation-Driven Gold Weakness Tests Its Cash Return Outlook
summary: In recent weeks, Newmont Corporation updated investors on its 2026 outlook and capital-return framework, reaffirmed its quarterly dividend for Q4 2025, and saw its shares pressured as gold prices softened ahead of and following U.S. inflation data releases. This combination of macro-driven weakness in gold and company-specific guidance has shifted attention to how resilient Newmont’s operations and cash returns may be in a more volatile commodity backdrop. For this article, we’ll examine how...
